metadata.description: Collection of Claude Code plugins by ZaVang

plugins.name: claude-autoupdate
plugins.description: One-click Claude Code upgrade with automatic changelog summarization and core feature deep-dives

plugins.name: claude-init
plugins.description: One-click project initialization with CLAUDE.md templates, directory structure, and built-in agents

plugins.name: llm-bridge
plugins.description: Drop a production-ready LLM gateway into any Python project. Unified OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini/Vertex AI interface with structured output, retry, fallback, and key rotation.

plugins.name: project-chronicle
plugins.description: Auto-generate a development log for your project. Run /chronicle at the end of each session to append a timestamped summary to docs/chronicle.md — capturing steps, tools, skills, and outcomes across multiple sessions.
